current.detail: Sends automated timesheet reminders to selected Slack channels.
Reads and updates documents stored in SharePoint.
Supports common Office document and productivity workflows.

suggested.detail: Add Claude as an AI assistant inside Slack channels so teams can ask questions, summarise long discussions, extract action points, and quickly generate draft responses or content without leaving Slack.

Connect Claude to Pipedrive so it can summarise deal history, highlight key client context, draft proposal text, prepare follow-up emails, and support sales teams with faster CRM-based content generation.

current.detail: Posts deal updates and stage-change alerts to Slack.
Sends contracts for e-signature from deal records.
Creates SharePoint folders for new deals.

suggested.detail: Sync approved leave, holidays, and absence records from SafeHR into Outlook calendars so managers and teams can easily see staff availability when planning meetings, project work, and resourcing.

Send categorised expense and receipt data from Dext into the internal Finance App to reduce manual data entry, improve financial visibility, and support faster review of spending by project, client, or cost category.
Use Claude to generate plain-language summaries of expense reports, highlight unusual spending patterns, identify missing information, and support finance teams during review and approval workflows.

current.detail: Uses the CMS to manage website content.
Feeds internal knowledge into the AI assistant.
Provides bid templates and historical bid data.
Analyses scraped data for new opportunities.
Scrapes market data for opportunity discovery.
